=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/unknownInEffectCatch_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377021: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns `unknown`, so the Effect error type stays untyped. A specific typed error preserves error-channel information, for example by narrowing the value or wrapping it in `Data.TaggedError`. effect(unknownInEffectCatch)


==== /.src/unknownInEffectCatch_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics unknownInEffectCatch:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.tryPromise({
                           ~~~~~~~~!!! warning TS377021: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns `unknown`, so the Effect error type stays untyped. A specific typed error preserves error-channel information, for example by narrowing the value or wrapping it in `Data.TaggedError`. effect(unknownInEffectCatch)
      try: async () => 1,
      catch: (error) => error
    })
